title: artanthe cornifolia
intro: Artanthe cornifolia, also known as the horned passionflower, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Artanthe cornifolia include its ability to reduce anxiety and promote a good night's sleep, due to its sedative and calming effects. Artanthe cornifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
